publishedAbstract: - While deploying OCS 4.6 on bare metal using LSO (Internal-Attached devices mode), the below message is observed in `Create Storage Class` wizard: `Minimum Node Requirement: The OCS storage cluster require a minimum of 3 nodes for the initial deployment. Only 0 nodes match to the selected filters. Please adjust the filters to include more nodes`
publishedTitle: Error in `Create Storage Class` wizard while deploying OCS 4.6 on bare metal using LSO
